analysis.clinicalAnalysis: White rice has a high glycemic index and contains simple carbohydrates that cause rapid spikes in postprandial blood glucose levels. The oil and high starch content further impair short-term insulin efficiency.

White rice has a high glycemic index and contains simple carbohydrates that cause rapid spikes in postprandial blood glucose levels. The oil and high starch content further impair short-term insulin efficiency.
